GB 17896一2022
lamps(See 5.5 of GB 29143一2012) ;

h) Deleted efficiency test method in production process of ballasts for tubular fluorescent lamps，
ballasts for high-pressure sodium lamps，ballasts for metal-halide lamps，sampling plan of effi-
ciency test of ballasts for single-capped fluorescent induction lamps(See 6.2 of GB 17896一2012，
Clause 6 of GB 19574一2004. Clause 6 of GB 20053一2015, 6.3 of GB 29143一2012) ;

iD Updated the test methods (See Clause 5 and Annex A，Clause 6 and Annex A of GB 17896一
2012,， Clause 5 of GB 19574一2004，Clause 5 of GB 20053一2015，Clause 6 and Annex A of
GB 29143一2012).

Attention is drawn to the possibility that some of the elements of this document may be the subject

of patent rights. The issuing body of this document shall not be held responsible for identifying any

or all such patent rights.

This document was proposed and prepared by Standardization Administration .

The previous editions of the documents replaced by this document are as follows:

一GB 17896， the first edition was issued in 1999， revised in 2012;

一GB 19574， the first edition was issued in 2004;

一GB 20053， the first edition was issued in 2006，revised in 2015:

一GB 29143, the first edition was issued in 2012:

一This is the second revised edition of GB 17896，and the entire texts of GB 19574一2004，

GB 20053一2015 and GB 29143一2012 were amalgamated.
